description: Letter from a Lubavitcher rabbi? Signed and stamped Shneur Zalman Menaḥem the grandson of Ari Leib ( שניאור זלמן מנחם נכד הרב היקר ארי ליב . . . זצל מחברון ת״ו). The seal depicts the Cave of the Patriarchs. There are also Latin-script initials (SML?). Two fragments. Dating: likely ca. 1900.
